Highly versatile, '''chemical load grenades''' could be used for many different purposes. Each carrying a specific type of chemical within, their contents ranged from lethal [[Fex-M3/Legends|Fex-M3]] nerve gas to [[plank gas]], an airborne chemical which broke down mechanical objects. Some types were reusable and could carry multiple payloads.<ref name="AE" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
